title: Unmix AutoSpectral — unmix.autospectral
text: raw.data Expression data raw fcs files. Cells rows detectors columns. Columns fluorescent data must match columns spectra. spectra Spectral signatures fluorophores, normalized 0 1, fluorophores rows detectors columns. af.spectra Spectral signatures autofluorescences, normalized 0 1, fluorophores rows detectors columns. Prepare using get.af.spectra. asp AutoSpectral parameter list. spectra.variants Named list (names fluorophores) carrying matrices spectral signature variations fluorophore. Prepare using get.spectral.variants. Default NULL. use.dist0 Logical, controls whether selection optimal AF signature cell determined unmixing brings fluorophore signals closest 0 (use.dist0 = TRUE) unmixing minimizes per-cell residual (use.dist0 = FALSE). Default TRUE. verbose Logical, default TRUE. Whether send messages console. speed Default fast. Selector precision-speed trade-AutoSpectral per-cell fluorophore optimization. Options slow, medium fast. v1.0.0, controls number variants tested per cell (per fluorophore). variants takes longer, gives better resolution unmixed data. speed = fast, single variant tested; medium, three tested slow, 10 variants tested. AutoSpectral v1.0.0, options available pure R version. Installation AutoSpectralRcpp strongly encouraged speed, though. parallel Logical, default TRUE. new parallel processing always faster. threads Numeric, default NULL, case asp$worker.process.n used. asp$worker.process.n set default one less available cores machine. Multi-threading used parallel TRUE. n.variants Number variants test per cell. Allows explicit control number used, opposed speed, selects pre-defined choices. Providing numeric value n.variants override speed, allowing n.variants (max available) variants tested. default NULL, case n.variants ignored. ... Ignored. Previously used deprecated arguments calculate.error.

title: Joint AutoSpectral Unmixing (Pure R) — unmix.autospectral.joint
text: Pure-R implementation joint covariance-weighted AutoSpectral pipeline. Mirrors unmix_autospectral_joint_cpp (unmix_autospectral_joint_pipeline.cpp) instruction--instruction, without requiring AutoSpectralRcpp. pipeline staged identically C++ version: Global weighted pseudoinverse + AF helper pre-computation (Section 1). Per-fluorophore variant pre-computation, including leakage weights rank-1 residual-update helpers (Section 2), plus structural collinearity table used later joint-pair conflict retries (Section 2B). Per-cell AF selection, optional multi-pass AF refinement residual (n.af.passes). Per-cell fluorophore solve AF-subtracted residual (optional per-cell Poisson-style weighting, cell.weight), followed joint variant selection: candidates scored alpha-weighted composite residual ratio covariance-propagated leakage ratio, conflicting swaps resolved residual-delta cosine similarity, swaps flagged structurally collinear pair queued retry winning partner's swap applied. commit individually verified currently accepted RSS reverted improve .

title: Joint AutoSpectral Unmixing (Pure R) — unmix.autospectral.joint
code: unmix.autospectral.joint(   raw.data,   spectra,   af.spectra,   asp,   spectra.variants = NULL,   n.passes = 1L,   parallel = TRUE,   threads = NULL,   cell.weight = FALSE,   noise.floor = NULL,   alpha = 0.5,   collinear.thresh = 0.5,   joint.pair.resolution = TRUE,   n.af.passes = 1L,   refine.af.quantile = 0.5,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Joint AutoSpectral Unmixing (Pure R) — unmix.autospectral.joint
text: raw.data Numeric matrix (cells x detectors). Columns must match spectra. spectra Numeric matrix (fluorophores x detectors, normalised 0-1). Must contain "AF" row. af.spectra Numeric matrix (n_af x detectors, normalised 0-1). Prepare using get.af.spectra(). least two rows required. asp AutoSpectral parameter list, prepared using get.autospectral.param(). Required parallel backend setup. spectra.variants Named list returned get.spectral.variants(), containing minimum $variants, $delta.list, $thresholds. optional $optimize.recommended slot respected: fluorophores flagged FALSE excluded variant optimisation. Pass NULL AF-mode (variant optimisation). n.passes Integer, default 1L. Number joint optimisation passes per cell. Matches n_passes unmix_autospectral_joint_cpp. parallel Logical, default TRUE. Whether use parallel processing across cells. Uses create.parallel.lapply() handle platform differences. threads Numeric, default NULL. Number worker threads. NULL, asp$worker.process.n used. threads = 0, parallelly::availableCores() used. Ignored parallel = FALSE. cell.weight Logical, default FALSE. Enables per-cell Poisson-style detector weighting (1 / max(|y_hat|, noise.floor)), matching cell_weight C++ pipeline. FALSE, weighting collapses (-ones, unless global weight requested) w.global used Section 1. noise.floor Numeric scalar length-D vector, default NULL. Per-detector noise floor used weighting scheme; falls back constant 125.0 per detector NULL, matching C++ default. used cell.weight = TRUE. alpha Numeric [0, 1], default 0.5. Weighting exponent joint candidate score: resid.ratio^alpha * leakage.ratio^(1 - alpha). collinear.thresh Numeric, default 0.5. Cosine-similarity threshold (pseudoinverse row space) two optimisable fluorophores flagged structurally collinear joint-pair conflict retries. joint.pair.resolution Logical, default TRUE. TRUE, candidate swap conflicts already-committed swap belonging structurally collinear partner queued retried partner's swap applied (rather simply dropped). n.af.passes Integer, default 1L. Number AF selection passes. > 1, cells initial AF abundance refine.af.quantile quantile re-scored residual subsequent passes, accumulating additional AF abundance refinement score < 1.0. AF index used output always one selected first pass. refine.af.quantile Numeric [0, 1], default 0.5. Quantile (type 7) first-pass AF abundance used select cells eligible AF refinement passes. verbose Logical, default TRUE.

title: Joint AutoSpectral Unmixing (Pure R) — unmix.autospectral.joint
text: Numeric matrix (cells x (n_fluorophores + 2)) column names matching row names spectra plus "AF" (abundance selected AF component) "AF Index" (1-based index af.spectra selected AF spectrum).

title: Unmix FCS Data — unmix.fcs
text: fcs.file character string specifying path FCS file. spectra matrix containing spectral data. Fluorophores rows, detectors columns. asp AutoSpectral parameter list. Prepare using get.autospectral.param. flow.control list containing flow cytometry control parameters. method character string specifying unmixing method use. default version 1.0.0 now AutoSpectral avoid confusion. use AutoSpectral unmixing, must provide least af.spectra perform autofluorescence extraction (per-cell basis). also optimize fluorophore spectra, provide spectra.variants. perform types unmixing, select options: OLS, WLS, Poisson FastPoisson. FastPoisson requires installation AutoSpectralRcpp. weighted Logical, whether use ordinary weighted least squares unmixing base algorithm AutoSpectral legacy pipeline unmixing. Default FALSE use OLS. weights Optional numeric vector weights (one per fluorescent detector). Default NULL, case weighting done channel means (Poisson variance). used WLS. af.spectra Spectral signatures autofluorescences, normalized 0 1, fluorophores rows detectors columns. Prepare using get.af.spectra. Required AutoSpectral unmixing. Default NULL thus provoke failure spectra provided AutoSpectral selected. spectra.variants Named list (names fluorophores) carrying matrices spectral signature variations fluorophore. Prepare using get.spectral.variants. Default NULL. Used AutoSpectral unmixing. Required per-cell fluorophore optimization. output.dir character string specifying directory save unmixed FCS file. Default NULL, use ./AutoSpectral_unmixed. file.suffix character string append output file name. Default NULL. include.raw logical value indicating whether include raw expression data written FCS file. Default FALSE provide smaller output files. include.imaging logical value indicating whether include imaging parameters written FCS file. Default TRUE. use.dist0 Legacy pipeline argument. Logical, controls whether selection optimal AF signature cell determined minimization potential AF spillover fluorophore channels (use.dist0 = TRUE) unmixing minimizes per-cell residual (use.dist0 = FALSE). Default TRUE. Used legacy AutoSpectral unmixing. divergence.threshold Numeric. Used FastPoisson . Threshold trigger reversion towards WLS unmixing Poisson result diverges given point. deprecated. divergence.handling String. handle divergent cells Poisson IRLS. Options NonNeg (non-negativity enforced), WLS (revert WLS initial unmix) Balance (WLS NonNeg averaged). Default Balance. deprecated. balance.weight Numeric. Weighting average non-convergent cells. Used Balance option divergence.handling. Default 0.5. deprecated. speed Selector precision-speed trade-AutoSpectral per-cell fluorophore optimization. Options fast, medium slow, default fast. version 1.0.0, backend works changed. Spectral variants AF signatures now pre-screened per cell identify likely candidates, brute force testing variants longer required. , speed controls number variants tested per cell, fast testing single variant, medium testing 3 variants, slow testing 10 variants. now implemented pure R AutoSpectral, installation AutoSpectralRcpp strongly encouraged faster processing. parallel Logical, default TRUE, enables parallel processing per-cell unmixing methods. threads Numeric, defaults single thread sequential processing (parallel=FALSE) available cores parallel=TRUE. verbose Logical, controls messaging. Default TRUE. Set FALSE shut . n.variants Numeric, used legacy AutoSpectral pipeline unmixing. Number variants test per cell. Allows explicit control number used, opposed speed, selects pre-defined choices. Providing numeric value n.variants override speed, allowing n.variants (max available) variants tested. default NULL, case n.variants ignored. chunk.size Numeric, number events use per chunk unmixing. Used manage memory processing large FCS files. rough guide, need approximately 10x size raw FCS file disk available memory. Default set 2e6 events, assuming ~20GB memory available. pipeline Character, one "legacy" (default) "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). "joint" uses new covariance-weighted joint per-cell pipeline; "legacy" reproduces behaviour AutoSpectral prior version 1.6.0. n.passes Integer, default 1L. Number joint optimisation passes per cell. used pipeline = "joint". Set higher improvement unmixing high spillover datasets. n.af.passes Integer, default 1L. Number autofluorescence extraction passes per cell. used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). cell.weight Logical, default FALSE. Applies per-cell detector weighting joint unmixing solve. used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). noise.floor Numeric, default 125. Lower clamp denominator per-cell detector weights cell.weight = TRUE. used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). alpha Numeric, default 0.5. Weighting balancing residual covariance spillover minimization. used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). collinear.threshold Numeric, default 0.5. Cosine similarity value trigger conflict assessment collinear fluorophore variants. used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). joint.pair.resolution Logical, default TRUE. Whether perform conflict-resolution collinear fluorophore pairs. used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). refine.af.quantile Numeric, default 0.5. Fraction cells taken forward additional AF passes (see n.af.passes). used pipeline = "joint". Passed unmix.autospectral.rcpp(). ... Ignored. Used catch deprecated arguments.

what: m \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Grid — unmixed.mxn.plot
title: m \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Grid — unmixed.mxn.plot
text: Produces grid scatter biplots comparing set m target fluorophores (x-axis) every channel dataset (y-axis), saves result multi-panel PDF.  target fluorophore defines one row panels; columns correspond selected channels. Data downsampled max.points events panel drawn, panels share cell population.  Axis minima auto-scaled per channel using 1st percentile data, floored user-supplied x.min / y.min. Panels can use either geom_hex (default, fastest) standard geom_scattermore + stat_density_2d combination create.biplot().

title: m \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Grid — unmixed.mxn.plot
code: unmixed.mxn.plot(   unmixed.data,   fluorophore,   asp,   channels = NULL,   max.points = 50000,   title = "mxn_biplot",   biplot.size = 3,   n.col = NULL,   x.min = -1000,   y.min = -1000,   x.width.basis = -1000,   y.width.basis = -1000,   use.hex = TRUE,   hex.bins = 64,   color.palette = "viridis",   output.dir = "." )

title: m \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Grid — unmixed.mxn.plot
text: unmixed.data Either character string giving path unmixed FCS file, numeric matrix / data.frame whose columns fluorophore channels whose rows cells. fluorophore Character vector length \(m\). Names target fluorophores place x-axis (one row panels per entry). Every element must present colnames(unmixed.data) (FCS columns). asp AutoSpectral parameter list, created get.autospectral.param(). channels Optional character vector. Subset channels use y-axis columns. NULL (default) columns except fluorophore used. Must present data supplied. max.points Integer. Total number events retain single random downsample applied drawing panel. Default 5e4. title Character string used PDF filename stem overall plot title. Default "mxn_biplot". biplot.size Numeric. Edge length inches individual panel. Default 3. n.col Integer. Number panel columns per page. NULL (default) set number y-axis channels, giving one row panels per target fluorophore single page. x.min Numeric. Floor auto-scaled x-axis minimum (data units). actual minimum used min(auto, x.min). Default -1000. y.min Numeric. Floor auto-scaled y-axis minimum (data units). Default -1000. x.width.basis Numeric. Width basis biexponential x-axis transform (passed flowWorkspace::flowjo_biexp()). Default -1000. y.width.basis Numeric. Width basis biexponential y-axis transform. Default -1000. use.hex Logical. TRUE (default), panels rendered ggplot2::geom_hex() speed. FALSE, reverts scattermore::geom_scattermore() + ggplot2::stat_density_2d(). hex.bins Integer. Number bins geom_hex dimension. Ignored use.hex = FALSE. Default 64. color.palette Character string. Viridis palette name ("viridis", "magma", "inferno", "plasma", "cividis", "rocket", "mako", "turbo") "rainbow" use package default gradient. Default "viridis". output.dir Character string. Directory output PDF. Created automatically absent. Default ".".

title: m \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Grid — unmixed.mxn.plot
text: combined cowplot::plot_grid() object returned invisibly. PDF always written output.dir.

what: n \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Triangle — unmixed.nxn.plot
title: n \(\times\) n Unmixed Biplot Triangle — unmixed.nxn.plot
text: Produces lower-triangular grid scatter biplots every pair channels unmixed dataset, 1-D histograms diagonal, saves result single large-format PDF. \(n\) channels grid \(n \times n\) panels.  upper triangle cells diagonal left blank, giving \(n(n-1)/2\) scatter panels \(n\) histogram panels.  Panel \((, j)\) (row \(\), column \(j\)) shows column \(j\) x-axis row \(\) y-axis, consistent convention used unmixed.mxn.plot(): named fluorophore always appears x. Data downsampled max.points events panel drawn panels share identical cell population.  Axis minima auto-scaled per channel 1st percentile data, floored user-supplied x.min / y.min.

title: AutoSpectral 1.6.0 (2026-06-01)
text: Automated spectral profile extraction using approaches developed Nathan Laniewski flowState. simplifies workflow considerably, eliminates need gating, key cause stress. new automated approach employs projection orthogonalization determine peak channel (way control going isn’t like autofluorescence?), uses cosine filtering (events least contaminated AF?) find clean spectral signatures. New joint unmixing pipeline (unmix.autospectral.joint()), implemented C++, using covariance-weighted spillover residual alignment solve autofluorescence fluorophore assignment together rather sequentially. Structurally collinear fluorophore pairs (e.g., APC/BUV661) handled via joint-pair conflict resolution genuine double-positive signal isn’t suppressed. Seven new tuning parameters (n.af.passes, cell.weight, noise.floor, alpha, collinear.threshold, joint.pair.resolution, refine.af.quantile) now wired unmix.fcs() unmix.folder(). calculate.optimize.necessity() determine cells actually require per-cell fluorophore optimization, avoiding unnecessary computation. Multipass autofluorescence refinement using matching-pursuit approach, fixed pass-1 baseline denominators prevent noise dominating highest-abundance cells later passes. simulate.flow.data() generates synthetic ground-truth data summing single-stained controls, providing benchmark false-negative rates double-positive populations. New AF autofluorescence comparison benchmarking functions evaluating accuracy ground truth. merging approaches per-cell autofluorescence assignment using covariance structure: assign.af.joint.cov() assess autofluorescence variation impacts fluorophore values, joint scoring residuals. improves existing residual- projection-based AF assignment methods. Extension variance-covariance error propagation plus residuals scoring metric per-cell fluorophore optimization. avoids previous need optimize reduced space positive fluorophores cell, responsible discontinuities appearing several data sets around zero. Legacy mode support. pre-existing workflows remain intact, must accessed via legacy argument function calls. AutoSpectral landing page. Type ?AutoSpectral IDE open workflow overview links key functions articles. FCS 3.1 compliance. Modified FCS files now carry $ORIGINALITY, $LAST_MODIFIER, $LAST_MODIFIED keywords per FCS 3.1 standard.

title: AutoSpectral 1.6.0 (2026-06-01)
text: C++ accelerated FCS reading writing via AutoSpectralRcpp. Adapted work Samuel Granjeaud. Much faster plotting throughout, using combination point downsampling, raster rendering (ragg/scattermore), C++ acceleration AutoSpectralRcpp available. Faster variant AF spectra determination via EmbedSOM AutoSpectralRcpp installed. viridis added dependency improved colour scaling density plots. Support patchwork allow manual faceting combination plots. Spectral reference library updated additional entries. Scatter-matching via k-nearest neighbours higher precision. Cosine filtering unstained samples fluorophore spectral profiles reduce potential errors “unstained” isn’t actually completely unstained. Cosine filtering kNN background matching get.spectra.variants() reduce undesireable influence autofluorescence. Non-negative clamping spectral profiles prevent artefactual negative spectral values propagating unmixing. Type-checking validation added function entry (e.g., get.spectral.variants()) guard deprecated positional arguments silently corrupting subsequent parameters, explicit error messages. Cell weighting now enabled default ID7000, detection thresholds relaxed platform. NAMESPACE injection optional dependencies (AutoSpectralRcpp, EmbedSOM) replaced requireNamespace() calls safer, portable pattern. Removed cairo methods package dependencies. Defensive tryCatch wrapping around plotting calls, guards unintended matrix--vector dropping. Guards added low cell count edge cases prevent dimension errors. General function code cleanup throughout.

title: AutoSpectral 1.0.0 (2026-02-10)
text: Version 1.0.0 brings revamp AutoSpectral identifies best spectra per-cell basis. theory behind remains –still trying identify variation autofluorescence fluorophores best reduces residual per-cell basis. Now, however, need using brute force. Instead, can search variants (autofluorescences) align given cell’s residual. Thus can pre-screen variants select test just . means can figure solution way less time. also means native R implementation algorithm possible R somewhat reasonable time frame. , may help anyone struggling use fast C++ version AutoSpectralRcpp. Specifics detailed article GitHub Colibri Cytometry. Since can now quickly identify variants useful given cell, can test variants, allowing finer-grained view variation, may improve unmixing quality. Autofluorescence extraction fluorophore variation extraction now modified allow searching variation, focusing “problematic” cells remain far first batch variation applied. helpful extracting autofluorescence complex tissue samples, AutoSpectral previously struggled deal last messy cells. enable , set refine=TRUE. Speed unmixing biggest change, particularly run using AutoSpectralRcpp. extracting autofluorescence using get.af.spectra(), can now get set plots showing unmixed data channels affected autofluorescence (“worst channels”). channels plotted single round autofluorescence extraction per cell (AutoSpectral v0.9.2 earlier) well second round, using data difficult cells. see , run refine = TRUE.
